title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.

title: Bitcoin treasury space still has fair share of ‘carnival barkers’: BSTR founder
summary: BSTR co-founder Sean Bill says many Bitcoin treasury companies lack the “ability to actually deploy Bitcoin.”

title: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to US Help
summary: Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.

title: Hegseth Praises Asian Allies, Takes Swipe at NATO
summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth praised defense allies in Asia and hailed newly stable ties with China, while taking swipes at longstanding security partners in Europe. title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
summary: Dimon vowed to fight the passage of the crypto market structure bill until the bitter end.

title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

title: Court-ordered Circle freeze traps $12.6 million in Zama cUSDC contract amid Overnight Finance suit
summary: Zama CEO Rand Hindi said the protocol's confidential USDC contract was "caught in a crossfire" and that his team is investigating the freeze.

title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.

title: Trump will remain ‘patient’ in pursuit of a deal with Iran, says Hegseth
summary: President wants to make a ‘great’ deal but defence secretary warns US is ready to restart attacks

title: Hegseth says US-China ties are ‘better than in years’
summary: Pentagon chief still presses allies to boost defence spending to counter ‘military build-up’ by Beijing
